project: Apex Roofing Co. — Roofing Contractor Website

tech_stack.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 + CSS custom properties
tech_stack.cms: Sanity v3 (mock adapter in frontend_focus mode)

notes: frontend_focus mode: no backend or OpenAPI spec required. Developer generates typed mock adapters for CMS and form submission surfaces.
Auth modal opted out: marketing-only site, no user accounts.
Root package.json shim required at repo root for workspace ergonomics.
delivery_class: baseline_prototype until Sanity CMS and integrations are wired with real env vars.
